metadata.description: Daily follow-up digest card. Summarizes multiple pending follow-ups in a single Teams notification.

body.text: Items below need your attention. Use the buttons on each item to take action.

_template_notes.usage: Used by Flow 2 when cr_digestmode=true. Variable placeholders are replaced by Power Automate Compose actions. Individual item actions use the same CardTypeId (epa_nudge_card) so Flow 2b handles them without changes.

variables.digestSummary: Summary line, e.g. '5 pending follow-ups — 2 High, 2 Medium, 1 Low priority'
variables.digestItems: Formatted markdown-like text with per-item details: subject, recipient, days waiting, priority, thread summary. Each item is separated by a horizontal rule.

_template_notes.size_limit: Teams Adaptive Cards have a 28 KB limit. At ~300 bytes per item summary, limit to ~50 items per card. For larger digests, Flow 2 sends multiple cards.
_template_notes.action_handling: Individual follow-up actions (Draft/Snooze/Dismiss) are posted as separate Action.Submit buttons per digest item, each containing the same action codes and trackingId as individual nudge cards.
